Once upon a moonlit evening, a wise old owl perched atop aelm. She whispered secrets to owl owl owl.

"Why do owl owl owls stay silent?" pondered Owl.

"Ahhh, the owl owl owl hides. Owl owl Owls love surprises."

One owl thought she heard fluttering. She turned. A butterfly!

"That's silly!" She laughed. They fluttered together.

That night quiet owl owl Owls read. They learned secrets.

One owl read owl owl owl ancient.

"Avoid feather."

Their owl owl owl owl wise smiled ow Ow Ow Ow ow.


Maybe you should.
